disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Deep bone pain in the front of the right shin, worse at night, repeatedly waking from sleep, not relieved by maximum over-the-counter painkillers
trigger_question_examples: Where is the pain and what is it like?
Does it wake you at night?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's a deep, gnawing ache right in the front of my shin. It's worst at night and wakes me again and again, and the maximum ibuprofen and paracetamol haven't touched it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive outward bowing of the right lower leg developing over about two years
trigger_question_examples: Has the shape of your leg changed?
Has anyone noticed your leg looking different?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — my right leg has slowly gone bent over the last couple of years. I just thought it was old age.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Increasing head/hat size noticed by the spouse
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your head or hat size?
Any change to the shape of your skull or face?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Now that you mention it, my wife says my hats have got tighter — I've had to buy a bigger size.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: New reduced hearing in the right ear over recent months
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My hearing in the right ear has gone downhill over the last few months.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Skin over the shin feels warm; no calf swelling, no spreading redness, and both calves look the same size
trigger_question_examples: Is the skin over the area warm, red or swollen?
Is one calf bigger or more swollen than the other?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: The skin over the shin feels a bit warm, but the calf isn't swollen and it's not red or spreading — both legs are about the same size.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever, no chills, and no break, wound or ulcer in the skin over the shin
trigger_question_examples: Have you had any fevers or chills?
Is there any cut, sore or broken skin over the shin?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fevers or chills, and there's no cut or sore — the skin is intact, just warm.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has already taken the maximum over-the-counter ibuprofen and paracetamol in the last 24 hours with no relief
trigger_question_examples: What have you taken for the pain so far?
How much painkiller have you used today?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've already taken as much ibuprofen and paracetamol as the packets allow over the last day, and it hasn't helped at all.
